title: Business Analyst General Insurance Regulatory, Finance & Accounting
description:
Capgemini is looking for a skilled Business Analyst specializing in General Insurance Regulatory, Finance and Accounting for a Leading Global Insurance Carrier.

We are seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Business Analyst with deep expertise in insurance finance, regulatory compliance, and accounting standards. This role will support strategic initiatives including M&A due diligence, IFRS 17 implementation, risk management, and financial reporting across multiple insurance lines.

This role involves analyzing business and regulatory requirements to ensure compliance with local and international insurance regulations. You will assist in the preparation of financial reports, ensuring accuracy and timeliness in delivery. Your contributions will support the implementation of regulatory frameworks and promote the establishment of best practices across financial reporting processes. The ideal candidate will have a strong understanding of the insurance industry, particularly the nuances of regulatory requirements, and should possess excellent analytical abilities to interpret complex data.

Our client is one of the largest insurance companies globally, known for its innovation, scale, and commitment to excellence.

Key Responsibilities:

M&A Due Diligence & Audits


Lead financial due diligence for insurance acquisitions and strategic partnerships
Manage large-scale on-site and remote audits, evaluating underwriting performance, claims reserves, and financial stability


Accounting & IFRS (Including IFRS 17)


Oversee implementation and compliance with IFRS 17 and related standards for statutory reporting
Identify and optimize accounting processes to ensure efficient booking flows and reduce manual interventions


Risk Management & GRC (Insurance-Focused)


Develop and refine Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) frameworks aligned with regulatory bodies such as Solvency II
Monitor risk exposure across underwriting portfolios, claims, and reinsurance contracts


Controlling & Reporting


Supervise budgeting, forecasting, and variance analysis across Life, Non-Life, and Reinsurance lines
Design and deliver executive dashboards to communicate financial performance, claims ratios, and reserve adequacy


Requirements

Qualifications:

Financial Expertise


Proven experience in financial due diligence, audits, IFRS compliance, and controlling within the insurance sector
Strong understanding of Solvency II, capital adequacy, and risk modeling


Analytical Tools & BI


Hands-on experience with BigQuery or similar data platforms
Proficiency in dashboard creation tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau) to generate actionable insights


Project Management & Leadership


Demonstrated success in managing cross-functional teams and facilitating stakeholder workshops
Strong report writing, presentation, and communication skills


Professional Qualifications


CFA (completed or in progress); certifications such as CERA or other insurance risk credentials are a plus
Deep knowledge of IFRS 17 and Solvency II frameworks


Benefits

Competitive compensation and benefits package:


Competitive salary and performance-based bonuses
Comprehensive benefits package
Career development and training opportunities
Flexible work arrangements (remote and/or office-based)
Dynamic and inclusive work culture within a globally renowned group
Private Health Insurance
Retirement Benefits
Paid Time Off
Training & Development
Performance Bonus


Note: Benefits differ based on employee level.

About Capgemini

Capgemini is a global leader in partnering with companies to transform and manage their business by harnessing the power of technology. The Group is guided every day by its purpose of unleashing human energy through technology for an inclusive and sustainable future. It is a responsible and diverse organization of over 350,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong 55-year heritage and deep industry expertise, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to address the entire breadth of their business needs, from strategy and design to operations, fueled by the fast evolving and innovative world of cloud, data, AI, connectivity, software, digital engineering and platforms. The Group reported €22 billion in revenues in 2024.

https://www.capgemini.com/us-en/about-us/who-we-are/
Show more

title: FP&A Analyst
description:
Job Description-

FP&A Analyst We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical finance professional with 2-4 years of experience to support budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning activities. The ideal candidate should have a strong understanding of financial analysis, excellent problemsolving skills, and the ability to work cross-functionally within a fast-paced finance environment.




Key Responsibilities:

 Assist in the preparation of annual budgets, quarterly forecasts, and long-range financial plans.

 Perform variance analysis (actuals vs. budget/forecast) and provide clear explanations.

 Prepare monthly management reports, dashboards, and presentations.

 Analyze revenue, costs, margins, and operating expense trends.

 Gather, model, analyze, and summarize information for financial plans, forecasts, and future projections on a monthly or quarterly basis.

 Track key performance indicators (KPIs) and highlight risks and opportunities.

 Ensure accuracy, consistency, and timeliness of financial data and reports.

 Support ad-hoc financial analysis and management requests.

 Participate in process improvements and automation initiatives.




Required Skills & Qualifications:

 Bachelor’s degree in finance, Accounting, or related field.

 Minimum 2-4 years of relevant experience in FP&A / financial analysis.

 Working knowledge of financial statements (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow).

 Experience with budgeting, forecasting, and variance analysis.

 Strong Excel skills (Pivot tables, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, formulas).

 Experience with Power BI, Tableau, or other reporting tools.

 Prior experience in a corporate finance environment.

 Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

 High attention to detail and accuracy.

 Ability to communicate financial information clearly.

 Strong organizational and time management skills; ability to meet deadlines

 Ability to work independently and collaboratively within and outside the team.

 Demonstrate confidentiality and integrity in handling financial data.

Show more

title: Business Analyst
description:
Role/Job Title: Business Analyst/ Sr Business Analyst

Function/ Department: Information Technology




Job Purpose

To lead business analysis for finance and procurement transformation initiatives by optimizing procure‑to‑pay processes, enhancing ERP (Oracle/SAP) workflows, and ensuring compliance with GST, TDS, and banking integrations. The role enables efficient vendor management, accurate payment processing, and strong cross‑functional collaboration to support IDFC FIRST Bank’s operational and digital transformation goals.




Primary Skills

7 - 10 years as a Business Analyst on enterprise finance, procurement, or ERP transformation programmes
Proven hands-on experience with procure-to-pay (P2P) processes: purchase requisitions, purchase orders, goods receipt, invoice matching, and payment runs
Strong understanding of payment processing workflows including TDS deductions, advance/milestone-based payments, and bank integration (NEFT/RTGS/IMPS)
Experience working with Oracle EBS or a comparable ERP (SAP, Microsoft Dynamics) in a finance/AP/procurement context
Familiarity with Indian GST compliance: GSTIN validation, e-invoicing (IRN/IRP), GSTR filing, and ITC reconciliation
Demonstrated ability to define complex approval workflows, DOA matrices, and business rules for configurable systems
Experience with vendor management processes including onboarding, KYC, scoring, and contract management
Excellent stakeholder management skills with the ability to work across finance, procurement, compliance, and technology teams
Strong documentation skills: BRDs, FRDs, user stories, process maps (BPMN), and data flow diagrams




Secondary Skill




Experience with cloud-native or microservices-based platforms (Spring Boot, Kafka, React)
Exposure to OCR/AI-driven invoice processing or document extraction tools
CBAP, PMI-PBA, or equivalent BA certification
Experience with vendor portals or B2B self-service platforms
Prior involvement in MSME compliance, e-way bill integration, or government API integrations (GSTN GSP, Income Tax)




Education Qualification:

Graduation: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc) / Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) / Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA)
Post-Graduation: Master of Science (M.Sc) /Master of Technology (M.Tech) / Master of Computer Applications (MCA)

title: Analyst- Procurement
description:
Summary

Position Summary

Job Title: Procurement Analyst - Government and Public Services Enabling Areas (GPS EA)

The Team:

As part of the GPS EA, team members work collaboratively to ensure that the organization is operating effectively and efficiently, and that it is meeting its goals and objectives. This includes developing and implementing strategic plans, managing budgets and resources, supply chain insights, supply chain projections and analysis, optimizing supply chain processes, ensuring compliance with government regulations and organizational policies, and supporting other departments in their work. The GPS EA plays a crucial role in enabling an organization to deliver high-quality services to its government and public sector clients.

Work you will do.


Support critical and complex competitive bidding processes, conducting routine
Price and cost analyses to ensure optimal outcomes.
Apply proven sourcing strategies to effectively support business clients’ requirements for software,


hardware, and other commodities.


Provide supply chain insights, analysis, and help in developing strategic supply chain approach
Provide proposal support to GPS Deloitte Proposal Teams, including advising on the development


of bills of materials for software, hardware, and other commodities as needed.


Demonstrate advanced interpersonal, oral, and written communication skills, with a strong emphasis


on delivering customer-oriented services.


Strategically manage supplier relationships to maximize value and mitigate risk.
Monitor supply markets in key categories, maintain awareness of supplier diversity programs,


and stay informed on trends within industry associations and the diverse supplier community.


Respond to field inquiries from suppliers and connect them with appropriate internal stakeholders.
Perform other job-related duties as assigned to support organizational objectives.


Qualification & Skills:


Any graduate/post-graduate with supply chain, procurement and logistics background.
Proven experience in purchasing software, SaaS solutions, and other IT-related products.
Experience in providing supply chain insights, projections and data analysis
Familiarity with the procurement portals /Procure to Pay platform is preferred
1-4 years of P2P experience in buying software and hardware.
Demonstrated expertise in negotiating and leveraging value-added reseller agreements.
Proficiency in MS Outlook, Excel, and PowerPoint.
Strong consultative and communication skills.
Ability to thrive in a challenging and dynamic environment.
Knowledge of SharePoint, Power BI, data analytics, and AI tools, including their practical applications.
Track record of effective collaboration and teamwork.
Understanding of government regulations (FAR and DFAR) is a plus


Work Location: Hyderabad

Timings: 2PM-11PM

Our purpose

Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.

Our people and culture

Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.

Professional development

At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state-of-the-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India .

Benefits To Help You Thrive

At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.

Recruiting tips

From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

title: Business Data Analyst – Data & Analytics
description:
Candescent is a forward-thinking technology company transforming how financial institutions deliver Intelligent Banking experiences. We unite digital banking, account opening, and branch solutions that power and connect digital banking, account opening, and branch solutions—creating seamless engagement across digital, remote, and in-person channels.

Our Experience-Led, Intelligence-Driven approach combines human-centered design with data, automation, and cloud-based innovation. Built on an API-first architecture, our extensible ecosystem enables institutions to adapt quickly, integrate easily, and unlock new opportunities for growth—turning every customer interaction into a moment of clarity, confidence, and connection.

Job Title : Business Analyst – Data & Analytics Practice

Location : Bangalore/ Hyderabad India

Department : Enterprise Architecture & Engineering

Reports To : Sr. Manager - Data & Analytics Practice

Job Summary

We are seeking a dynamic and results-oriented Business Analyst to join our Data and Analytics Practice. The ideal candidate will bridge the gap between business needs and data-driven solutions, working closely with cross-functional teams to deliver insights that inform strategic decisions. You will be instrumental in driving value from data through analysis, visualization, and storytelling.

Essential Duties And Responsibilities-


Requirement Gathering - Collaborate with stakeholders to gather and analyze business requirements related to data, reporting, and analytics.
Business Process mapping - Translate business problems into analytical questions and identify data sources needed to support analysis.
Data Analysis - Perform data exploration, validation, and transformation to prepare datasets for analysis.
Data Visualization - Develop dashboards, reports, and visualizations using tools such as Power BI, Tableau, or Looker.
Story Telling - Generate actionable insights and present findings to stakeholders through compelling data stories.
Collaboration with Data Team - Work with data engineers and architects to define data pipelines and ensure data quality and integrity. Contribute to the development and evolution of best practices within the analytics team.
Manage and run Story Board - Support the development of KPIs, metrics, and business performance frameworks.


Required Qualifications


Master’s degree in Business Analytics, Information Systems, Economics, or related field (MBA preferred)


2.2-5 years of experience in a business analytics, data analytics, or BI role.


Proficiency in SQL and at least one analytics/visualization tool (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, Qlik).
Strong Excel and data manipulation skills: experience with Python/R is a plus.
Excellent problem-solving, critical thinking, and communication skills.
Ability to manage multiple projects in a fast-paced, agile environment.


Preferred Qualifications


Experience working in cloud-based data environments (e.g., AWS, Azure, GCP).
Familiarity with data modeling concepts and tools like dbt, Snowflake, or BigQuery.
Exposure to predictive modeling or statistical techniques.
Domain expertise in (Finance-AP/AR/GL/Profitability, Billing, Sales, Service, Marketing, etc.] is a plus.


Why Join Us?


Work on challenging, high-impact projects that drive business transformation.
Collaborate with talented professionals in a culture that values innovation and continuous learning.
Opportunities for growth, mentorship, and career development in the analytics space.


Statement to Third Party Agencies

To ALL recruitment agencies: Candescent only accepts resumes from agencies on the preferred supplier list. Please do not forward resumes to our applicant tracking system, Candescent employees, or any Candescent facility. Candescent is not responsible for any fees or charges associated with unsolicited resumes.

title: Associate Analyst - Executive Assistant Support - USI Leadership Support Centre
description:
Summary

Position Summary

USI Leadership Support Center – Associate Analyst – Deloitte Support Services India Private Limited

Join our team of dedicated enabling area professionals in Deloitte US’ organization in India (USI) who support global teams. The Central Business Services (CBS) organisation in the UK receive support from the Extended Delivery Centre (EDC) in USI.

We are looking to recruit outstanding individuals to become a pivotal part of our Leadership Support Centre team within Business Support Services. The role will be of interest to those who have a positive attitude, willingness to learn with good organisational skills. Ingenuity, resilience, and integrity, with an ability to use your own initiative to resolve problems quickly will be key to success in this role.

Work you’ll do

Ideal candidates will be looking to start a career in Business Support Services.You will have access to a comprehensive support and training package designed to equip you with the skills and competence that will be invaluable to you if you wish to explore a career as either an Executive Assistant or other roles within Deloitte.

Responsibilities of the role include:

Responsibilities of the role include:


Support UK based Executive Assistants (EAs) in submitting expense claims, the reconciliation of American Express statements, booking meeting rooms and creating travel itineraries on behalf of Partners using the required Deloitte systems to do so in line with policy
Support with and respond to ad hoc requests and general queries from EAs in a timely manner
Manage requests and tickets through the ESS Service Portal (Service Now) in line with ESS best practice
Adhere to Quality Assurance policies by filing all deliverables, as well as all correspondence with EAs and other requestors in the designated Microsoft Teams folders
Understand and adhere to the Deloitte UK Travel & Expenses policy
Update service documentation and training manuals (SOPs, Process Maps and SIPOCs) when required
Out-of-Office alternative contact: Supporting the movement of client emails during periods of absence and leave of Senior Directors
Building strong relationships with key client EAs
Establishing a rapport with key stakeholders, partners, directors, and staff
Cover during periods of holiday and sickness
Ad hoc projects/tasks for senior directors and associate partners
Working effectively in diverse teams within an inclusive team culture where people are recognised for their contribution


The team

This is an opportunity to join a new and dynamic team, critical for the delivery of fast-paced business support to our Senior Director/Associate Partner community in the UK member firm and working out of our Hyderabad office of USI.

Qualifications

Required:


Any Graduate fresher or an experienced candidate with less than 11 months of experience in Admin assistant roles
Good working knowledge of Microsoft office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook)
Ability to plan, prioritise, multi-task and manage own workload to tight deadlines
Proactive and creative approach to problem solving - ability to 'think outside the box'
Diligent, conscientious and with a strong attention to detail
Strong written and verbal communication skills; ability to draft own correspondence
Team Player


Work Location: Hyderabad

Work Timings: 2 Pm to 11 PM

Our purpose

Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.

Our people and culture

Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.

Professional development

At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state-of-the-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India .

Benefits To Help You Thrive

At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. title: BI & Reporting Analyst
description:
Overview

The Data Engineer & BI Analyst part of the Data Impact Benelux team. This role will help to enable accelerated growth for PepsiCo by contributing to the BENELUX BU Execution Tracking capability, a key pillar of the BU 2026 strategy. As a newly created position, this role will be responsible for designing an E2E solution to provide a 360 view on the BNL Execution KPIs merging multiple data sources (sDNA, Nielsen, CRM, Campaign & Customer data) into a scalable and reusable data architecture by levering the existing Azure Cloud Infrastructure. Once a solid back-end is finalized, the data must be translated into a multi-layered reporting solution in Power BI where multiple lenses must be applied to satisfy several business requirements from: CatMan, Perfect Store, Shopper Marketing, FSF, Sales and the broader commercial organization. Once the initial MVP is delivered, the solution must be industrialized and brought into production, entering hypercare phase. Key objective is to develop long term muscles and bring BNL to best in class Execution Tracking across EU, on par with the existing BU reporting suite.

Responsibilities


Data Modeling: Develop and implement predictive and prescriptive models to support business decision-making. Ensure data quality and integrity throughout the analysis process.
Design and implement data infrastructure and processing workflows required to support data science, machine learning, BI and reporting
Build robust, efficient, and reliable data pipelines consisting of diverse data sources (CRM, Nielsen, sDNA, Customer & Campaign Data)
Design and develop real time streaming and batch processing pipeline solutions
Own the data expertise and data quality for the pipelines
Clean and prepare data for use in advanced analytics, artificial intelligence, and machine learning projects
Build analysis in Python with accompanying documentation
Combine and manipulate data sources to produce value-added analyses from which insights and opportunities can be extracted
Communicate effectively with business to understand business needs, anticipate requirements more accurately and suggest best solution approach
Lead design, code & process review sessions to ensure compliance with established standards, policies, and performance guidelines. Design BI solutions based on guided analytics approach and best in class story telling delivery mode


Qualifications


Bachelor's or advanced degree in a quantitative field for instance a Bachelor or Master’s degree Scince or Business management (e.g., Computer Science, Mathematics, Statistics, Data Science) or equivalent experience
6 years + of Power-BI and Python experience
Strong experience in Power BI (Backend/Frontend) to develop compelling reports and dashboards
Experience in Databricks and Python/PySpark – Should be able to perform an ETL transformation of a large-scale datasets and combine different data sources
Experience with multiple data technologies and concepts such as SQL, NoSQL, Airflow, Kafka, Hadoop, Hive, Spark, MapReduce and Columnar databases (Good to have)
2+ years of experience with schema design and dimensional data modeling
Experience writing production code for Python or JVM-based systems, but you know a few other languages and like the right tool for the job

criteria.Industries: Manufacturing and Food and Beverage Services

title: Remote Business Analyst
description:
About Turing:

Turing is one of the world’s fastest-growing AI companies accelerating the advancement and deployment of powerful AI systems.

Turing helps customers in two ways: Working with the world’s leading AI labs to advance frontier model capabilities in thinking, reasoning, coding, agentic behavior, multimodality, multilinguality, STEM and frontier knowledge; and leveraging that work to build real-world AI systems that solve mission-critical priorities for companies.




Role Overview:

In this role, you will be working on projects to help fine-tune large language models (like ChatGPT) using your strong analytical and English comprehension skills. The ideal candidate should have the ability to read, summarize, and break down large content into smaller logical blocks, conduct research online, validate claims made in content through online research, and work with the LLM (Large Language Models) to solve puzzles! The projects will also help you learn how to leverage AI to be a better analyst. This is your chance to future-proof your career in an AI-first world!




Your role is critical in helping fine-tune and improve large language models (like gpt), and will make you an expert on how to leverage AI to be a better analyst. This is your chance to future-proof your career in an AI-first world!




What does day-to-day look like:

You would spend time answering a variety of interesting analytical questions and creating scenarios that can train the LLM models to get better. Here are a couple of examples that models might get wrong, and You would articulate the correct answer & explanation to enable the models to learn:
Based on a given distribution of sales by month across locations, could you analyze which location has grown the most? (Hint: what time period should we look at? should we account for sudden variability at the beginning?)
In a small town, there are four distinct neighborhoods: Oak, Pine, Maple, and Elm. A postman is assigned to deliver mail and can only deliver to two neighborhoods in one day, with certain rules (e.g. Oak is always visited before Pine). If he delivers to Oak and Elm on the first day, which neighborhoods does the carrier deliver to on the second day?




Note: No other prior specialized domain experience is needed.




Requirements:

English Proficiency: Ability to read and write in English with a high degree of comprehension skills.
Analytical Skills: Good research and analytical skills
Feedback Skills: Ability to provide constructive feedback and detailed annotations.
Creative Thinking: Creative and lateral thinking abilities.
Communication: Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
Independence: Self-motivated and able to work independently in a remote setting.
Technical Setup: Desktop/Laptop set up with a good internet connection.




Preferred Qualifications:

Bachelors degree or undergraduate in Engineering, Literature, Journalism, Communications, Arts, Statistics, or a related field. We are open to candidates who do not have a Bachelor's degree but have experience in the area.
Experience writing professionally (business analysts, research analyst, copywriter, journalist, technical writer, editor, translator, etc.)
Understanding of Excel and Google Suite.
Proficiency in Data interpretation, Logical reasoning and Basic arithmetic is preferred.




Perks of Freelancing With Turing:

Work in a fully remote environment.
Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI projects with leading LLM companies.
Potential for contract extension based on performance and project needs.




After applying, you will receive an email with a login link. Please use that link to access the portal and complete your profile.




Know amazing talent? Refer them at turing.com/referrals, and earn money from your network.

Show more

Proficiency in Data interpretation, Logical reasoning and Basic arithmetic is preferred.

Work in a fully remote environment.
Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI projects with leading LLM companies.

title: Remote Business Analyst
description:
About Turing:

Turing is one of the world’s fastest-growing AI companies accelerating the advancement and deployment of powerful AI systems.

Turing helps customers in two ways: Working with the world’s leading AI labs to advance frontier model capabilities in thinking, reasoning, coding, agentic behavior, multimodality, multilinguality, STEM and frontier knowledge; and leveraging that work to build real-world AI systems that solve mission-critical priorities for companies.




Role Overview:

In this role, you will be working on projects to help fine-tune large language models (like ChatGPT) using your strong analytical and English comprehension skills. The ideal candidate should have the ability to read, summarize, and break down large content into smaller logical blocks, conduct research online, validate claims made in content through online research, and work with the LLM (Large Language Models) to solve puzzles! The projects will also help you learn how to leverage AI to be a better analyst. This is your chance to future-proof your career in an AI-first world!




Your role is critical in helping fine-tune and improve large language models (like gpt), and will make you an expert on how to leverage AI to be a better analyst. This is your chance to future-proof your career in an AI-first world!




What does day-to-day look like:

You would spend time answering a variety of interesting analytical questions and creating scenarios that can train the LLM models to get better. Here are a couple of examples that models might get wrong, and You would articulate the correct answer & explanation to enable the models to learn:
Based on a given distribution of sales by month across locations, could you analyze which location has grown the most? (Hint: what time period should we look at? should we account for sudden variability at the beginning?)
In a small town, there are four distinct neighborhoods: Oak, Pine, Maple, and Elm. A postman is assigned to deliver mail and can only deliver to two neighborhoods in one day, with certain rules (e.g. Oak is always visited before Pine). If he delivers to Oak and Elm on the first day, which neighborhoods does the carrier deliver to on the second day?




Note: No other prior specialized domain experience is needed.




Requirements:

English Proficiency: Ability to read and write in English with a high degree of comprehension skills.
Analytical Skills: Good research and analytical skills
Feedback Skills: Ability to provide constructive feedback and detailed annotations.
Creative Thinking: Creative and lateral thinking abilities.
Communication: Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
Independence: Self-motivated and able to work independently in a remote setting.
Technical Setup: Desktop/Laptop set up with a good internet connection.




Preferred Qualifications:

Bachelors degree or undergraduate in Engineering, Literature, Journalism, Communications, Arts, Statistics, or a related field. We are open to candidates who do not have a Bachelor's degree but have experience in the area.
Experience writing professionally (business analysts, research analyst, copywriter, journalist, technical writer, editor, translator, etc.)
Understanding of Excel and Google Suite.
Proficiency in Data interpretation, Logical reasoning and Basic arithmetic is preferred.




Perks of Freelancing With Turing:

Work in a fully remote environment.
Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI projects with leading LLM companies.
Potential for contract extension based on performance and project needs.




After applying, you will receive an email with a login link. Please use that link to access the portal and complete your profile.




Know amazing talent? Refer them at turing.com/referrals, and earn money from your network.

title: Junior Business Analyst
description:
We are Lenovo. We do what we say. We own what we do. We WOW our customers.

Lenovo is a US$69 billion revenue global technology powerhouse, ranked #196 in the Fortune Global 500, and serving millions of customers every day in 180 markets. Focused on a bold vision to deliver Smarter Technology for All, Lenovo has built on its success as the world’s largest PC company with a full-stack portfolio of AI-enabled, AI-ready, and AI-optimized devices (PCs, workstations, smartphones, tablets), infrastructure (server, storage, edge, high performance computing and software defined infrastructure), software, solutions, and services. Lenovo’s continued investment in world-changing innovation is building a more equitable, trustworthy, and smarter future for everyone, everywhere. Lenovo is listed on the Hong Kong stock exchange under Lenovo Group Limited (HKSE: 992) (ADR: LNVGY).

This transformation together with Lenovo’s world-changing innovation is building a more inclusive, trustworthy, and smarter future for everyone, everywhere. To find out more visit www.lenovo.com, and read about the latest news via our StoryHub.

Roles Responsibilities

This role sits at the core of product execution — bridging business priorities, technology teams, and operational stakeholders to ensure seamless delivery and measurable outcomes. Work closely with Product Managers, Engineering, QA, and Business stakeholders to support the delivery of a globally used product serving enterprise customers. Be actively involved across all stages of the product lifecycle — from initial product planning and requirement discussions to solution design, development coordination, testing cycles, and final production release.

Participate in Agile ceremonies including sprint planning, daily stand-ups, grooming sessions, reviews, retrospectives, and cross-functional solution discussions. Ensure requirements are clearly defined and sprint-ready before development begins. Track sprint progress, monitor dependencies, and proactively resolve blockers within defined timelines to maintain delivery velocity and quality standards.

Support testing phases, user validation cycles, and release governance processes to ensure smooth deployments. Maintain structured communication with stakeholders on priorities, risks, and progress.

Must Have

Strong analytical and structured problem-solving skills. Technically sound with the ability to understand system workflows, product architecture, and effectively collaborate with engineering teams. Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills. High ownership mindset with a proactive, execution-focused approach. Organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable managing multiple priorities in a fast-paced, global product environment. Strong collaboration skills with the ability to drive alignment across cross-functional teams.

Basic Qualifications


Pursuing MBA/PGDM (2-year regular full-time residential program) - Major/ Minor in Operations and Analytics - Preferred
Prior understanding of ServiceNow - Preferred
Strong analytical and logical thinking ability
Self-motivated and results-oriented
Ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams
Strong verbal and written communication skills
Understanding of Agile methodology or product-based environments (preferred)
Demonstrated leadership through academic, project, or extracurricular initiatives
Comfortable engaging with global stakeholders and business users


#NextGenTech

We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class.

title: Business Analyst
description:
Payments Business Analyst - FX




Deloitte is actively hiring Business Analyst experienced in the Banking domain and Digital Transformation initiatives, specifically in Payments (Domestic / International Payment Schemes, end-to-end Payment’s lifecycle experience, corporate payments).




Location - PAN India

Hybrid Mode of working

Experience - 12-18Yrs (8+yrs as Relevant)




Domain Knowledge and Experience of being part of project with some or all of the mentioned functionalities:




FX Order Placement & Execution

Forward Contracts: Lock in an exchange rate for a future date, helping customers manage currency risk for upcoming transactions.
FX Limit Orders: Set target exchange rates; the app automatically executes the conversion when the market hits the specified rate.




FX Rate Alerts & Market Insights

Rate Notifications: Set up alerts for preferred exchange rates, so customers are notified when their target rate is reached.
Market News & Analysis: Access curated FX market insights, trends, and forecasts directly within the app.







Role Description:

Associate will be part of Digital Transformation projects with Global Banks supported by Deloitte
Should be able to exhibit digital transformation experience of delivering Banking products
Is expected to work with end client business stakeholders, transformation colleagues and technology teams while delivering requirements on the assigned programs
Should have excellent communication, articulation, and stakeholder management skills
Should be able to articulate change management experience
Should have experience and be comfortable working in Agile environment
Demonstrate experience in coordinating business stakeholders, development and testing teams during the development lifecycle
Ability to work in fast paced environment; possess excellent written & verbal communication skills.
Desirable to have experience with backlog management tools (e.g. Jira)
Desirable to have designing, developing, and maintaining complex applications using TDD and BDD practices
Spot FX Transactions: Instantly convert currencies at prevailing market rates. Customers can transfer funds between their own accounts in different currencies or make international payments.

title: Data Analyst
description:
Role Purpose

To support the secured lending business by developing, managing, and optimizing MIS reports, dashboards, and performance trackers. The role will ensure timely and accurate data availability for decision-making across sales, credit, collections, and product teams.

Key Responsibilities


MIS Development & Reporting:
Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly business MIS reports on disbursements, lead funnel, sourcing performance, TAT, and productivity metrics.
Track business KPIs and SLAs across sales, credit, and operations.
Data Management & Accuracy:
Maintain databases with high accuracy.
Ensure data integrity and consistency across multiple sources (CRM, LMS, core systems).
Business Performance Analysis:
Analyze sales trends, geography/branch-wise performance, and product-level insights.
Assist in preparing dashboards and presentations for leadership reviews.
Automation & Efficiency:
Automate repetitive reports and processes using Excel Macros, Power Query, or Python (if applicable).
Collaborate with the IT/Data team to streamline data fetching and storage.
Cross-Functional Support:
Coordinate with product, credit, risk, and collections teams to align on reporting requirements.
Support ad-hoc data requirements for business planning, audits, or regulatory submissions.

title: Associate Research Scientist
description:
Job Description

Position: Scientist / Research Associate – In Vitro Screening & Functional Assays

Location: Vapi, Gujarat

Company: Nuvo Labs Pvt. Ltd. (Meril Life Sciences Group)

About the Role

Nuvo Labs Pvt. Ltd. is seeking a highly motivated scientist/research associate to support in vitro screening and functional characterization of therapeutic antibodies and drug molecules. The candidate will contribute to high-throughput screening, cell-based functional assays, and biochemical characterization to support antibody discovery and lead candidate selection in drug discovery programs.

Key Responsibilities

In Vitro Screening & Functional Assays

Design and execute high-throughput and medium-throughput screening assays for monoclonal and bispecific antibodies.
Develop and perform cell-based functional assays, including:
Receptor binding and signaling assays
Reporter assays
Cytokine release assays
Immune cell activation assays
ADCC / ADCP assays

Antibody Characterization

Perform binding and affinity characterization using techniques such as:
ELISA
Flow Cytometry
Other biochemical and immunological assays

Drug Discovery Support

Screen antibody and drug molecule panels to support lead candidate identification and selection.
Analyze experimental data and prepare scientific reports to support internal research programs.

Required Technical Skills

Candidates should have strong hands-on experience in:

Mammalian cell culture techniques
Biochemical assays, including:
Western Blotting
Immunoprecipitation
Molecular biology techniques, including:
RNA processing
qPCR
ddPCR
Cloning

Preferred Qualifications

M.Sc. / M.Tech / PhD in Biotechnology, Molecular Biology, Biochemistry, Life Sciences, or related field
Experience working in antibody discovery, immunology, or drug discovery laboratories
Familiarity with flow cytometry and functional immune assays is highly desirable.

Key Competencies

Strong experimental and analytical skills
Ability to design and optimize biological assays
Strong documentation and scientific reporting skills
Ability to work in a collaborative research environment

title: Business Analyst
description:
Job Title: Product Manager/ Product Owner (CPR) – Consulting Practice




Base Location: Bangalore

(Should be willing to travel internationally or within India as per business requirements)




Role Overview:

Own product strategy and delivery across cross‑functional, global teams. Partner with Strategic Business Managers to translate business outcomes into product roadmaps, measurable value, and scaled execution. Contribute to business growth through deal shaping, high‑quality RFP leadership, and thought leadership, while building reusable IP and scalable capabilities for the consulting practice.




What You’ll Do:




Product & Portfolio Leadership

Own the product vision and roadmap end-to-end. Define strategic outcomes, prioritize the backlog, and set measurable OKRs/KPIs that guide delivery. Ensure every release drive clear customer and business impact. Continuously refine plans based on insights and performance.
Lead full‑cycle product delivery from discovery to launch. Drive requirements gathering, create clear documentation, and oversee solution design with engineering and design teams. Define acceptance criteria, UAT strategy, and release readiness. Ensure smooth launch, change control, and adoption across markets.
Champion agile execution using Scrum or Kanban. Lead ceremonies, manage sprint flow, and drive predictability and throughput. Identify risks, remove blockers, and coordinate across global, multi‑vendor teams. Continuously improve team delivery practices and velocity.
Be the voice of the customer in every decision. Conduct discovery, analyse usage patterns, and translate insights into actionable requirements. Validate problems before solutions and advocate for customer-centric design. Ensure every feature solves a real user need.
Manage and influence senior stakeholders effectively. Build trusted relationships across business, engineering, operations, and leadership teams. Align priorities, shape solutions, and drive consensus using data-backed reasoning. Communicate progress and trade-offs with clarity and confidence.
Drive data-led decision-making and continuous improvement. Establish tracking, dashboards, and success metrics for all key initiatives. Use qualitative and quantitative insights to validate bets, assess impact, and inform future iterations. Ensure outcomes—not just outputs—are delivered.

Consulting & Solutioning

Lead strategic solutioning and advisory engagements. Understand client business priorities, industry dynamics, and enterprise “fields of play.” Translate insights into high‑impact strategies, operating models, and actionable blueprints. Present solutions with clarity, structure, and executive‑ready storytelling.
Drive creation of enterprise‑level process and operating model designs. Apply frameworks such as APQC, SCOR, BPMN, and other best‑practice methodologies to build scalable, standardized processes. Identify optimization opportunities, design future‑state workflows, and align them to strategic business outcomes. Ensure solutions are pragmatic, adoptable, and backed by strong value cases.
Design digital solutions, automation opportunities, and transformation roadmaps. Assess current systems and tools and identify areas where technology can unlock efficiency or new capabilities. Build business cases detailing ROI, cost-to-serve improvements, and customer impact. Collaborate with cross‑functional teams to align feasibility, sequencing, and adoption plans.
Lead proposals, RFP responses, solutioning and go‑to‑market initiatives. Structure solution narratives, commercial models, and delivery approaches that differentiate the offering. Drive thought leadership in client conversations and steer deal strategy in partnership with sales leaders. Consistently contribute to revenue growth, pipeline shaping, and account expansion.
Shape thought leadership and practice capability. Develop accelerators, frameworks, templates, and reusable assets that elevate consulting quality and speed-to-solution. Author POVs, whitepapers, and industry insights to establish practice credibility. Represent the practice in internal and external forums as a strategic thinker.
Mentor and lead consulting teams—coach consultants and managers in structured problem‑solving, client communication, and delivery excellence. Ensure high‑quality outputs and strong client experiences.

Critical Success Factors:

Experience: 7–14 years across strategic consulting, product development/management, process/business consulting, digital transformation; strong PM/PO delivery credentials.
Education: 2-year full-time MBA from a reputed institute
Domain Exposure: Multidomain exposure with strength in CPRD plus one or more: CRM, Automotive, Healthcare, Ecommerce, SCM/logistics
Proven experience in advisory roles and ability to steer programs/initiatives/projects with senior leadership.
Strong experience across SDLC and Agile program management with hands‑on process modeling, mapping, and standardization using industry frameworks.
At least two relevant certifications (SAFe POPM, CSPO, PSPO, CSM, CBAP, CCBA, ECBA).
Strong working knowledge of JIRA, Confluence, MS Visio, ServiceNow, and MS Office (PowerPoint, Excel, Word).
Strong interpersonal and communication skills (written and verbal) with excellent critical thinking, decision‑making, analytical reasoning, and data interpretation capabilities.




Good to Have:

Additional certifications such as Six Sigma/Green Belt, PMP, PRINCE2, or other process improvement credentials.
Experience working on AI‑led engagements or digital intelligence projects.

Show more

description:

To research and analyze credit risk for SEG and SME cases through existing due diligence processes, external agency support and in conjunction with the sales staff and risk team

title: Business Analyst - PMO
description:
Job Title: Business Analyst – PMO

Job Description

We are seeking a detail-oriented Business Analyst – PMO to support planning, tracking, and governance of key business initiatives and projects. The role will work closely with program managers and cross-functional teams to analyze business requirements, monitor project performance, and enable data-driven decision-making.

The incumbent will be responsible for tracking project milestones, preparing management dashboards, analyzing business data, and identifying risks or deviations from plan. The role will also support documentation of processes, preparation of reports and presentations for leadership reviews, and coordination across teams to ensure timely execution of initiatives.

Key Responsibilities


Gather and document business requirements for key projects and initiatives.
Track project progress, timelines, and deliverables across programs.
Prepare dashboards, MIS reports, and performance analysis for leadership.
Identify risks, bottlenecks, and improvement opportunities in project execution.
Support PMO governance through structured reporting and documentation.


Requirements


Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Business, or related field (MBA preferred).
3–6 years of experience in business analysis, PMO, or project coordination roles.
Strong analytical, documentation, and problem-solving skills.
Proficiency in Excel, PowerPoint, and reporting tools.
Ability to work with multiple stakeholders in a fast-paced environment.

title: Business Analyst
description:
We're looking for a Business Analytics who can be the analytical brain behind Chalo Premium Buses. You'll convert data from routes, users, and revenue into decisions that move the business forward.This isn't just number-crunching, you'll bridge business stakeholders and our tech/data science teams, deliver performance visibility, proactive insights, and build automation-first reporting systems.




Location: Navi Mumbai

Experience: 3-6 years




What You'll Do




Revenue & Forecasting




Own end-to-end revenue analysis, demand forecasting models, and unit economics tracking
Support data-driven pricing decisions with cost vs. budget analysis




Business Insights & Root Cause Analysis




Lead structured RCAs for revenue, bookings, and user behavior deviations
Proactively surface trends and deliver prioritized action recommendations




Analytics & Reporting




Analyze route-level profitability, load factors, and user cohorts (acquisition, retention, churn)
Build and automate daily/weekly/monthly dashboards across SQL, event tracking, and ops systems
Conduct funnel analysis and recommend product interventions




AI & Automation




Use LLM tools to accelerate insights and reporting
Collaborate with data scientists on demand and churn models
Champion data-driven culture and automation-first workflows




What We're Looking For




3-6 years of experience in business analytics, data analytics, or similar roles
Advanced SQL - you should be comfortable with large-scale cloud data warehouses (Snowflake, BigQuery, etc.)
BI Tools - Experience with Metabase, Tableau, Power BI, or similar (mandatory)
Event Analytics - Proficiency with event tracking platforms (Amplitude, Mixpanel, etc.)
Excel/Google Sheets - Advanced level (mandatory)
Strong understanding of P&L, unit economics, and transport KPIs
Hypothesis-first, structured problem-solving approach
Ability to convert analysis into clear, concise business narratives
Confident presenter to senior leadership
Travel-tech, mobility, or transport experience preferred

title: Analyst/Senior Analyst (TMT)
description:
Location

New Delhi

Job Description

Job title: Analyst/Senior Analyst (TMT)

Company Description

We’re L.E.K. Consulting, a global strategy consultancy working with business leaders to seize competitive advantage and amplify growth. Our insights are catalysts that reshape the trajectory of our clients’ businesses, uncovering opportunities and empowering them to master their moments of truth. Since 1983, our worldwide practice—spanning the Americas, Asia Pacific, and Europe—has guided leaders across all industries, from global corporations to emerging entrepreneurial businesses and private equity investors. Looking for more? Visit

Position Overview

The L.E.K. Capability Network (LCN) is an integrated part of L.E.K. Consulting, collaborating closely with consulting teams in L.E.K.’s worldwide network of offices to support them on their toughest and most impactful assignments.

The Analyst / Senior Analyst at LCN plays a critical role in supporting case teams by leading analytical modules, managing research initiatives, and providing insightful recommendations.

A typical project might involve an in-depth primary research campaign to identify and triage potential experts to speak to in a particular field, before holding discussions with them to discover their insights on a topic. It could involve rigorous secondary research to prove or disprove a client hypothesis, leveraging the full arsenal of L.E.K. toolkits and databases. Or it could mean undertaking a critical analysis to illuminate a pattern from the noise around it, to substantiate a strategic decision. They are expected to take greater ownership of their work, proactively structure analysis, and effectively communicate findings. This role requires strong problem-solving skills, the ability to manage multiple tasks across time zones, and a collaborative mindset to mentor junior analysts and contribute to L.E.K.'s culture. More information can be found at

We are currently hiring for Analyst/Senior Analysts into the LCN, a role which will report into the LCN Team lead/Team manager

Primary Research

Responsibilities will include, but are not limited to:


Manage interview campaign including creating IV guide, expert identification, managing expert networks and other vendors, and manage real-time update
Independently work with consulting staff on projects by sourcing content experts and key opinion leaders (e.g., with LinkedIn, expert networks, cold calling, etc.)
Write solicitations for experts to conduct interviews with case teams, and custom solicitations for key opinion leaders (e.g., referring to papers he / she has published)
Conduct local / international interview campaigns and summarize key takeaways from the interview to help case teams derive strategic conclusions
Extract and curate key insights from interviews to validate or challenge case hypotheses, driving informed decision-making


Secondary research


Own end-to-end secondary research modules, identifying relevant data sources and extracting key insights
Collaborate with teams to identify secondary research resources that address client areas of interest (e.g., journal articles, marketing / industry reports, government publications)
Confirm/disprove case team hypotheses, deriving insights and patterns from unstructured problem statements using publicly available reports, articles, thought pieces, company filings and GenAI
Independently contribute to case teams by applying structured problem-solving techniques to test and validate case hypotheses


Analysis: Modelling / surveys


Manage and deliver end-to-end survey analysis including coding, testing, analysis and curating insights
Co-develop comprehensive models such as market models, revenue models, and cost models to support various due-diligence cases
Utilize Excel, Alteryx, Tableau, and other analytical tools to structure data and create compelling visualizations
Review client data to understand gaps in datasets


Slide preparation and quality control


Design and recommend analytical frameworks to effectively present insights in a clear, accurate, and impactful manner
Develop clear and compelling commentary that extracts actionable insights
Create sophisticated visuals in PowerPoint and Tableau for consulting teams to use in client presentations
Collaborate with L.E.K. Graphic Design team to recommend visually interesting layouts for showing complex data
Review slide formatting for quality control, making layouts consistent and in line with L.E.K. brand standards (e.g., updating L.E.K. IP to current visual standards)


Coaching and mentorship


Provide support and oversight to junior analysts on projects, ensuring they meet project objectives
Coach junior analysts on technical skillsets such as secondary research using databases, effective slide writing and data analysis
Share industry insights and best practices with team members to enhance their skills and knowledge.


Case closure support


Prepare redacted versions of materials for delivery to KM
Prepare PowerPoint release documents for case team to deliver to client
Facilitate access agreements process for teams interacting with investors (e.g., as part of a due diligence)


Qualifications


The ideal candidate will have 3-5 years of relevant experience with a top-tier consulting firm
An undergraduate degree is required
Fair understanding of business concepts and their practical applications
Ability to work on multiple tasks and activities at once and flexibility to re-prioritize
Expert PowerPoint and Excel skills
Strong communication skills, both written and verbal
High attention to detail


Benefits And Perks


L.E.K. offers you the opportunity to work in a hybrid setup
We are among the best paying firms globally
Generous time away
We have Parental leaves (Maternity and Paternity) and flexible work options for new mothers
We provide childcare facilities in Mumbai (Day care / Creche services).
Wellness benefits – Health Insurance, Wellness Apps, Gym reimbursement, etc.


Show more

title: Credit Analyst – Fixed Income
description:
Job Purpose

The Credit Analyst supports the Fixed Income investment team by conducting rigorous credit research on issuers across corporate bonds, money?market instruments, securitized products, and financial institutions. The role enhances portfolio quality by identifying attractive opportunities, monitoring credit risks, and providing actionable recommendations aligned with the fund’s risk appetite and regulatory guidelines.

Job Context & Major Challenges

Job Context/Job Challenges

ABSLAMC offers investors a range of comprehensive investment options, which includes diversified and sector specific equity schemes, hybrid funds and a wide range of debt and treasury products. Its offerings also include Portfolio advisory services for High Net worth individuals as well as offshore funds for Non Resident Indians. There are approx. 119 schemes managed by the organisation as on Nov 2017. The Company follows a long-term, fundamental research based approach to investment and thrives to provide a transparent and ethical services to its investors.

One Of The Key Challenges For ABSLAMC Has Been To Maintain a Balance Between Moving With Dynamic And Constantly Changing Regulatory Norms Of The Country And Maintaining Growth And Profitability In The Extremely Competitive Market. And Some Of Key Strengths Of The Organization That Have Helped It To Sustain And Grow Are

Focus on Technology-The organization has been in the forefront in implementing technological innovation to foster innovation and also to improve efficiency for its stakeholders, whether it is employees, clients or distributors

Product Innovation-ABSLAMC has been known to be a pioneer in terms of products and has a history of launching innovative, category defining products like Birla Cash plus, etc.

Research based approach-ABSLAMC has one of the largest team of research analyst dedicated to tracking down the best companies to invest in

Strong Distributor Delivery Mechanism-The Company has developed a 4 -pronged sales/delivery mechanism to ensure maximum reach and penetration to the end customers. This mechanism includes Company’s direct Channels (branches/online), Independent Financial Advisors (IFAs), National Distributors (ND) and Banks.

Regulator Interface-ABSLAMC plays a key role in the Association of Mutual Funds in India (AMFI) with quite a few members of the top management being a part of the AMFI Board. It has hence ensured that it can discuss any new Industry development from a regulatory perspective at the initial stages with the Regulator as well as the Industry Association

People Management-ABSLAMC believes in continuously measuring the perception of its people using a 4-S approach, namely Satisfaction, Say, Stay and Strive, which has enabled it to garner a workforce committed and aligned to the overall business success.

Key Challenges For The Role Are As Follows

To predict performance trends of various companies and sectors and recommend investments in credit worthy companies within the sectors.

Ensuring zero NPAs by thorough due diligence and continuous tracking of the companys performance.

Continuously scouting for new investment avenues which could offer a higher yield but still would protect the investors’ interests.

Understanding industry dynamics, various business models and global and domestic factors that can impact the companys operating cash flows and consequently the ability to repay its obligations

Aligning views to fast changing economic environment and volatile markets

Key Result Areas

KRA (Accountabilities) (Max 1325 Characters)Supporting Actions (Max 1325 Characters)

KRA1 Fundamental Credit Research


Analyse issuers primarily BFSI using detailed study of financial statements, capital structure, liquidity, business models, and industry dynamics.
Evaluate key credit metrics: leverage, coverage ratios, working capital trends, cash?flow durability, refinancing risk, and promoter/ownership strength.
Assess ESG and governance factors that materially influence creditworthiness.


KRA2 Monitoring & Surveillance of Portfolio Exposures


Track all invested names for rating actions, covenant breaches, sector developments, regulatory changes, and adverse news.
Maintain internal credit ratings and outlooks, updating them based on earnings releases, management interactions, and market indicators (spreads, CDS, curve movements).
Generate early?warning signals for potential deterioration in issuer quality.


KRA3 Market & Sector Analysis


Analyse sectoral credit trends, cyclical vs structural risks, competitive position, and regulatory frameworks.
Contribute to top?down sectoral exposure strategy and recommendations.


KRA4 Investment Recommendations


Prepare concise and actionable credit notes for Investment Committee discussion:
Strengths & weaknesses
Key risks & mitigants
Valuation attractiveness (spreads vs peers, curve positioning, liquidity)
Highlight suitability of issuers/securities for different fund mandates (liquid, ultra?short, short?term, corporate bond, dynamic bond, credit risk, etc.).

KRA5 Engagement


Conduct periodic calls/meetings with company management, rating agencies, bankers, auditors, and sector experts.
Perform channel checks—vendors, customers, competitors—where relevant.


KRA 6 Regulatory & Policy Compliance


Ensure investments align with SEBI regulations, internal credit policy, exposure norms, issuer caps, and rating thresholds.
Maintain full documentation of credit notes, approvals, internal limits, and ongoing surveillance.


KRA7

Collaboration


Work closely with the team to support portfolio construction and trade decisions.


Collaborate with risk, compliance, and operations for approvals, risk sign?offs, and policy adherence

title: Senior Business Analyst
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Business Analyst with expertise in data governance, process mapping, and testing.

The ideal candidate will play a key role in bridging business needs with technical solutions, ensuring data integrity, compliance, and efficiency across organizational processes.

This role involves conducting workshops, collaborating with stakeholders, and driving improvements in data management and governance frameworks.

Key Responsibilities· Data & Process Mapping Analyze, document, and optimize business processes across function.

Develop detailed process maps, workflows, and data flow diagrams

Identify gaps, redundancies, and opportunities for automation or improvement.

Data Governance

Support the implementation of data governance frameworks and policies.

Map data lineage, ownership, and stewardship responsibilities.

Ensure compliance with data quality, security, and regulatory standards.

Testing & Validation.

Develop test cases and scenarios to validate process and data changes.

Conduct system and user acceptance testing (UAT).

Collaborate with technical teams to ensure accuracy and reliability of data-driven solutions.· Stakeholder Engagement

Conduct workshops and interviews with business and technical stakeholders.

Translate business requirements into functional specifications

Facilitate communication between business users, IT teams, and governance committees.

Documentation & Reporting·

Maintain clear documentation of processes, data models, and governance structures.·

Provide regular updates and reports to stakeholders on progress and findings.

Preferred Skills·

Conducting workshops, training sessions, and stakeholder interviews.·

Performing gap analysis to identify improvement opportunities.·

Mapping As-Is and To-Be processes for transformation initiatives.· Strong knowledge of ARIS or similar process modeling tools.·

Effective stakeholder management and facilitation skills.·

Ability to translate complex data governance requirements into actionable solutions.·

Experience in change management and process re-engineering

title: Associate
description:
Role Overview

We are hiring two Business Development Associates to strengthen our Consulting practice across Strategy, Process Transformation, Risk Advisory, Governance, and Sector-Specific Advisory engagements.

These are consulting-aligned Business Development roles — not transactional sales positions.

The selected candidates will work closely with partners and consulting teams to shape opportunities, develop structured proposals, and support strategic accounts. The role offers a defined pathway into Consulting for high performers.




Location: Mumbai (Preferred) | Open to Delhi & Bangalore

Experience: 1–5 Years




Key Responsibilities

Opportunity Identification & Market Research

Identify target sectors and enterprises aligned to practice priorities
Conduct structured company research and stakeholder mapping
Develop sector briefs and opportunity notes
Support strategic account planning

Proposal & Pitch Development

Prepare consulting-grade proposals and presentations
Translate client discussions into structured scope documents
Coordinate with internal teams for solution articulation
Ensure quality, consistency, and clarity in all submissions

Practice Positioning & Credentials

Support development of capability decks and credentials
Assist in preparing case studies and sector notes
Contribute to thought-led positioning initiatives

Pipeline Governance & Documentation

Maintain structured tracking of opportunities
Support bid management and submission timelines
Ensure documentation discipline and repository management
Participate in internal quality review processes




Ideal Candidate Profile

1–5 years of experience in:
Consulting BD or advisory firms
Strategy / research support roles
Structured enterprise sales environments
Strong analytical and writing skills
Excellent PowerPoint and documentation ability
Ability to understand consulting frameworks
Professional communication skills
High ownership mindset and attention to detail
Long-term interest in transitioning into Consulting




About Us

A technology, process and risk consulting firm providing digital transformation, ERP, BI and analytics, cybersecurity, GRC, automation and IT strategy services across multiple industries, backed by decades of advisory experience and a global network.




Life at PKF Consulting

At PKF, we hold our people in the highest regard and are deeply committed to fostering an inclusive, collaborative, and non-hierarchical work environment. Our team is composed of exceptionally talented professionals, many of whom are recognized as leading experts in their fields, bringing diverse perspectives and experiences from various backgrounds. We are passionate about mentoring and developing our people through continuous learning and training programs, encouraging a culture that values diverse ways of thinking. As part of PKF, you will have the opportunity to grow into the best version of your professional self under the mentorship of accomplished industry leaders — while also playing an active role in shaping the future of our firm.
